steps.t: Ontamo feels insulted by Isildur's decision to send his sons to conduct the inspection of Díngarth's defences, and has asked you to speak with them in…
The sons of Isildur have conducted their inspection, and now Vëamacil wishes to speak with you.
Tárandil is at Díngarth. Vëamacil has decided that you should come with them to Adambel, but that you should first ask his foster-brother Tárandil wha…
Vëamacil is waiting to speak to you, now that Tárandil has given you no suggestions for his birthday present.
Tárandil has gone to the primary Gondorian encampment of Adambel. Vëamacil asked you to slay Orcs and wargs and bring trophies of your victories to hi…
Tárandil is in the primary Gondorian encampment of Adambel.
Isildur is at the Gondorian encampment of Adambel.
